title: hex-agent as First-Class SpacetimeDB WebSocket Client
description: Behavioral specification for replacing hex-agent's REST polling coordination with direct SpacetimeDB WebSocket subscriptions. Covers task assignment, code generation, inference routing, and task completion signal paths.

actors.hex_agent: Docker worker process running hex-agent binary
actors.spacetimedb: SpacetimeDB instance running hexflo-coordination and inference-gateway WASM modules
actors.hex_nexus: hex-nexus daemon — filesystem bridge only, not coordination hub
actors.outer_supervisor: hex dev pipeline supervisor on the host machine

scenarios.title: Agent connects to SpacetimeDB at startup
given: SPACETIMEDB_TOKEN is set (resolved from vault by hex-nexus on agent registration)
then: Agent establishes WebSocket connection to SpacetimeDB
Agent subscribes to swarm_task table WHERE agent_id = {self} AND status = 'pending'
Agent subscribes to inference_response table WHERE agent_id = {self}
Agent calls agent_heartbeat reducer every 30 seconds
Agent logs: '[hex-agent] connected to SpacetimeDB at {url}'
failure_modes: SpacetimeDB unreachable: agent falls back to REST polling every 5s (existing behavior)
Token invalid: agent logs error and exits with code 1

scenarios.title: Supervisor encodes WorkplanStep in task payload
given: Supervisor has a WorkplanStep to execute
Supervisor has determined output_dir and model_hint for the step
scenarios.when: Supervisor creates a HexFlo task for the step
then: Task title = human-readable step summary (unchanged)
Task description = JSON-encoded TaskPayload: { step_id, description, tier, language, output_dir, model_hint, context: { workplan_summary, existing_file_paths } }
Task is created in SpacetimeDB via task_create reducer
Supervisor subscribes to swarm_task WHERE id = {task_id} to watch for status changes

scenarios.title: Agent receives task assignment via push notification
given: A task is created with agent_id matching this agent
scenarios.when: SpacetimeDB pushes swarm_task row update to agent's subscription
then: Agent deserializes TaskPayload from task.description
Agent calls task_assign(task_id, agent_id) reducer to set status = 'in_progress'
Agent begins code generation for the step
Latency from task creation to agent acknowledgement: < 100ms

scenarios.title: Agent requests inference via SpacetimeDB reducer
given: Agent has a WorkplanStep and needs to generate code
Agent has constructed the inference prompt
scenarios.when: Agent calls inference_request_create(agent_id, model, messages) reducer
then: SpacetimeDB stores inference_request row with status = 'pending'
hex-nexus (subscribed to inference_request table) receives push notification
hex-nexus makes HTTP call to appropriate provider (OpenRouter/Anthropic/Ollama)
hex-nexus calls inference_response_complete(request_id, content, model, tokens) reducer
Agent receives inference_response push via subscription
Agent proceeds with code generation using the response content
failure_modes: Inference times out (600s): SpacetimeDB marks request as 'failed', agent receives failure push
Model unavailable: hex-nexus tries fallback chain, updates response with actual model used

scenarios.title: Agent writes generated code to output_dir via hex-nexus
given: Agent has generated code content from inference response
output_dir is set in task payload
then: Agent calls POST /api/files/write with { path: output_dir/src/..., content: ... }
hex-nexus writes the file to the filesystem
Agent reads back the written path to confirm write succeeded
Agent records written_files: [list of paths] for inclusion in task result

scenarios.title: Agent runs compile check and reports result
given: Agent has written generated files to output_dir
Language is known from task payload
then: Agent calls POST /api/compile-check with { dir: output_dir, language }
hex-nexus runs tsc --noEmit / cargo check / go build in output_dir
Result: { success: bool, error_count: int, errors: [string] }
Agent includes compile result in task result JSON

scenarios.title: Agent completes task via SpacetimeDB reducer
given: Agent has written files and run compile check
scenarios.when: Agent calls task_complete(task_id, result_json, now) reducer
then: SpacetimeDB updates swarm_task row: status = 'completed', result = result_json
Outer supervisor receives push notification via subscription
Supervisor extracts compile_status, written_files from result_json
Supervisor updates ObjectiveState (CodeGenerated, CodeCompiles) without re-running checks
End-to-end latency from task_complete call to supervisor seeing 'completed': < 100ms

scenarios.title: Supervisor reacts to task completion without polling
given: Supervisor is subscribed to swarm_task WHERE id = {task_id}
scenarios.when: SpacetimeDB pushes task status update to supervisor subscription
then: Supervisor immediately proceeds to objective evaluation
No 120s timeout occurs
No filesystem fallback needed
Supervisor logs: '[tier N] task {id} completed by {agent_id} in {duration_ms}ms'

scenarios.title: Graceful fallback when SpacetimeDB is unavailable
given: SPACETIMEDB_URL is set but SpacetimeDB is down
then: Agent logs: '[hex-agent] SpacetimeDB unavailable — falling back to REST polling'
Agent uses existing REST polling path (GET /api/hexflo/tasks/claim every 5s)
Agent uses REST PATCH for task completion
Agent uses POST /api/inference/complete for inference
Behavior is degraded but functional (existing behavior preserved)

TaskPayload.tier: integer — dependency tier (0 = domain, 1 = secondary adapter, etc.)
TaskPayload.output_dir: string — absolute path to project directory

context.workplan_summary: string — brief summary of the overall workplan
context.existing_file_paths: string[] — list of already-written files for context

TaskResult.written_files: string[] — paths of files written relative to output_dir
TaskResult.compile_status: object — { success: bool, error_count: int, errors: string[] }
TaskResult.model_used: string — actual model that produced the code

acceptance_criteria: AC-001: Agent connects to SpacetimeDB within 2s of startup; logs connection confirmed
AC-002: Task assignment delivered to agent within 100ms of task_create reducer call
AC-003: No REST polling for task assignment when SpacetimeDB is available
AC-004: Inference request routes through inference-gateway reducer, not POST /api/inference/complete
AC-005: task_complete reducer call updates task status atomically; no 403 or 404
AC-006: Supervisor sees task status = 'completed' within 100ms of task_complete call
AC-007: No nested 'hex dev start --auto' inside Docker worker
AC-008: WorkplanStep context (language, tier, output_dir, model_hint) is available to worker
AC-009: Compile result is included in TaskResult and used by supervisor for objective evaluation
AC-010: Fallback to REST polling is transparent to the supervisor
out_of_scope: Rewriting the outer supervisor's TDD feedback loop (unchanged)
Changing the Docker container image build process (unchanged)
Multi-file code generation in a single task (single file per step, as today)
dependencies: SpacetimeDB hexflo-coordination module deployed with task_assign, task_complete, agent_heartbeat reducers
SpacetimeDB inference-gateway module deployed with inference_request_create reducer
hex-nexus processes inference_request table and calls inference_response_complete reducer
